## 🐛 Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is. Ex. When I try to send a message, I get an error...

## 📋 Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## 🔧 Environment

| Component | Version |
|-----------|---------|
| VS Code version | |
| Extension version | |
| OS | |
| Node.js version | |
| Telegram API | |

## 💻 Console Output

1. Open **Help → Toggle Developer Tools → Console**
2. Look for any errors (red text)
3. Copy and paste relevant errors below:

```
(paste error output here)
```

## 📸 Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.

---

**Thank you for reporting!** 🎉

Tips:
- Search existing issues first - someone may have reported it already
- Include all environment details - this helps us reproduce the issue
- Include the console output - this usually contains the root cause
